explanation: I tried to continue immediately so the required-name validation appears.
I entered the missing applicant name so the journey can continue.
The name is complete now, so I am moving to the updates question.
I continued without choosing updates so the required selection validation appears.
I selected Yes so the journey starts on the email-updates branch.
I entered the initial email address so the first review state includes the email row.
The initial answers are complete, so I am moving to check answers on the email branch.
I followed the updates change link so I can remove the email branch from the summary.
I switched the updates answer to No, which should remove the email row from the review page.
The branch changed, so I am returning to review to confirm the email row disappeared.
I followed the name change link so I can make a second summary edit on the no-email branch.
I replaced the original name with the final corrected value.
The updated name is entered, so I am moving back through the preserved updates answer.
The no-email branch is still complete, so I am returning to review to confirm the name change before re-adding email.
I followed the updates change link again so I can add the email branch back from the summary.
I switched the route back to the email branch, which makes the email address required again.
I continued without an email so the new required-field validation appears inside the change flow.
I entered the replacement email address so the re-added branch can continue.
The final email branch is complete now, so I am returning to review to verify the final summary and stop before sending.

action.question: The application is ready and Send application would submit it. Do you want me to continue?

explanation: The final send action would submit the application, so I need confirmation before continuing.
